words.meaning: to be the property of or be a member of
words.example: This book belongs to the library.

words.meaning: to talk about something in detail
words.example: We discussed the plan at length.

words.meaning: to show that something is important
words.example: Please highlight the main dates in your notes.

words.meaning: to show clearly how something works or why something is true
words.example: The teacher demonstrated how to use the new software.

words.meaning: to move people or goods from one place to another
words.example: The company transports fresh food every morning.

words.meaning: to provide money for a project or activity
words.example: The city will finance the new library project.

words.meaning: to enjoy the taste or feeling of something slowly
words.example: They savored the local food after the long trip.

words.meaning: to work with other people on the same task
words.japaneseMeaning: 協力する、共同で作業する
words.example: Students collaborated on a video project.

words.meaning: to allow someone to do something
words.example: The school does not permit phones during exams.
